title: Berber's Brews
description: Custom potion effects and recipes that make the new effects available in Survival.
body:
# Berber's Brews
Includes nine new custom potion effects that should be helpful in Survival mode. One of these potions has 12 subtypes.

## Effects
### Teleportation
**Description:** Teleports affected entities to a random position in a set range. If this effect is applied underground, the target will be sent to the surface.

**Recipe:** Awkward Potion + Chorus Fruit

_Adding Glowstone Dust makes Teleportation II. This increases the teleportation range._
### Recollection
**Description:** Teleports affected entities to their spawn point, even across dimensions.

**Recipe:** Teleportation Potion + Fermented Spider Eye
### Return
**Description:** Teleports affected entities to their spawn point, even across dimensions. After that, Return will return the affected entity to their original location when the effect expires.

**Recipe:** Recollection Potion + Clock

_Adding Redstone Dust extends the time before returning from 5:00 to 10:00._
### Silence
**Description:** Affected entities have all sound effects muted. Additionally, affected entities will not trigger sculk sensors by walking, sprinting, jumping, opening chests, breaking blocks, or placing blocks.

**Recipe:** Awkward Potion + Echo Shard

_Adding Redstone Dust extends the duration from 3:00 to 8:00._
### Clairvoyance
**Description:** All entities nearby the effected target glow. The color of the glow is determined by whether the mob is hostile or passive.

**Recipe:** Awkward Potion + Glow Berry

_Adding Glowstone Dust extends the range at which entities can be seen through walls, at the cost of duration (1:30)._
_Adding Redstone Dust extends the duration from 3:00 to 8:00._
### Reach
**Description:** Players affected by this potion have increased melee range and block interaction range. Additionally, item pickup range is increased.

**Recipe:** Awkward Potion + Ender Pearl

_Adding Glowstone Dust increases the melee and block interaction range, as well as item pickup range, at the cost of duration (1:30)._
_Adding Redstone Dust extends the duration from 3:00 to 8:00._
### Peace
**Description:** Enforces a reduced hostile mob cap around affected entities. Does not despawn persistent mobs or existing mobs aggressively targeting the entity.

**Recipe:** Awkward Potion + Slimeball

_Adding Redstone Dust extends the duration from 3:00 to 8:00._
### Intuition
**Description:** When a player with this status effect casts a fishing line, the fishing outcome is predetermined early, and displayed to the player. This lets the player know what they are about to fish up, and make a decision whether or not to reel in the line. 
**[Also compatible with Cobblemon's Poke Rods.](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-intuition)**

**Recipe:** Awkward Potion + Prismarine Crystals

_Adding Redstone Dust extends the duration from 3:00 to 8:00._
### Perception
**Description:** Players affected by this potion will be able to hear nearby ores. Ores that can be heard depend on the material used in the brewing of the potion.

**Recipe:** Thick Potion + (Amethyst Shard, Coal, Raw Copper, Diamond, Emerald, Raw Gold, Raw Iron, Lapis Lazuli,
Nether Quartz, Netherite Scrap, or Redstone Dust)
_Adding Glowstone Dust extends the block hearing range, at the cost of duration (1:30)._
_Adding Redstone Dust extends the duration from 3:00 to 8:00._

_The variant of this potion brewed with Nether Quartz enables the hearing of miscellaneous ores (any modded ores properly tagged), as well as chests._
